calls.content:
### Work Breakdown Structure
- Backend Development
  - Design database schema for reviews and moderation status (2 person days)
  - Implement API endpoints for submitting reviews (3 person days)
  - Implement API endpoints for fetching reviews and average rating (2 person days)
  - Implement moderation workflow (approve/reject) (3 person days)
  - Handle photo uploads and storage (3 person days)
- Frontend Development
  - Add review submission UI (star rating, text, photo upload) (4 person days)
  - Display reviews on product pages (3 person days)
  - Show average rating on product pages (2 person days)
  - Add moderation interface for staff/admins (3 person days)
- QA & Testing
  - Write and execute test cases for review submission and moderation (3 person days)
  - Test photo upload and display (2 person days)
  - Test average rating calculation and display (1 person day)
- Deployment & Documentation
  - Update deployment scripts/configuration (1 person day)
  - Write user/admin documentation (2 person days)

### Total Estimate
39 person days

### Assumptions
- Existing e-commerce platform supports user authentication and product catalog.
- Photo uploads are limited to standard image formats and reasonable file sizes.
- Moderation will be manual, handled by staff via a simple admin interface.
- No advanced moderation features (e.g., automated spam detection) are required.
- The team is familiar with the current tech stack and has access to necessary resources.
- No major changes to the product page layout are required beyond review integration.
- Deployment and documentation processes are already established.
